div.h1: cgroup v2 File Layout for Container
div.p: Directory structure under /sys/fs/cgroup/ with read/write semantics

ul.li: echo $PID > cgroup.procs — Move process into cgroup
cat cpu.stat — Usage, throttle count, throttle time
cat cgroup.procs — List of PIDs in cgroup

div.p:
RW (Red): Configure limits — writes enforce kernel constraints
RO (Purple): Monitor usage — read current state and statistics
